courseTitle: Game Feel, UI, Audio, and Visual Communication
title: Pose Courier
genericDescription: Use animation states to communicate intention; connect animation timing to mechanics; avoid animation that lies about collision or control.
specificDescription: A paper courier with eight readable pose states: idle, run, brake, crouch, charge, dash, recover, and celebrate, all tied to mechanics.
gradingRubric: 30 pts animation readability; 20 pts mechanic-animation alignment; 20 pts control responsiveness; 15 pts polish; 15 pts iteration notes.
